_README: Static content the agent uses for non-emergency intents.
Fill in the TODO fields before pilot launch. Edit via PR.
Clinic info is NOT here — it comes from the `clinics` DB table at runtime.

en.summary: Arham Always Care relies on donations to keep our 45+ ambulances on the road and our clinics open. Every rupee saves an animal in pain.
en.tax_note: Donations are eligible for 80G tax exemption.

en.summary: We welcome volunteers — for ambulance ride-alongs, clinic shifts, fund-raising, and online awareness work.

about.en: Arham Always Care is the animal-rescue project of Arham Yuva Seva Group, a registered Indian non-profit. We have donated 45+ ambulances and run 5 clinics across India. We treat injured stray animals free of cost.

faq.a_en: Yes. All our ambulance rescue and clinic treatment is completely free for stray animals.
Our priority is injured stray and street animals. For pets, we'd recommend visiting a local veterinary clinic. We can share contacts on request.

faq.q_en: What if I see an injured animal but I'm not in a city you cover?
faq.a_en: We're expanding all the time, but for now we'd recommend contacting a local rescue group. You can also try Animal Helpline India at 1800-419-5860.

human_emergency_referral.en: Our service is for animal emergencies only. For a human medical emergency, please call 102 or 108 immediately. For police, call 112.
human_emergency_referral.hi: हमारी सेवा केवल जानवरों के लिए है। मानव चिकित्सा आपात स्थिति के लिए कृपया तुरंत 102 या 108 पर कॉल करें। पुलिस के लिए 112।
